commit_scope: Release Python receipt and proof-ledger carriers into Form-native recipes and proof bands.

commands: coord claim "release python receipt carriers into form native"
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/native-training-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/native-training-receipt-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/witness-state-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/android-mesh-learning-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/witness-state-receipt-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh native-training-receipt model-executor-proof-ledger android-mesh-learning witness-state-receipt
local_validation.notes: Deleted four standalone Python receipt/ledger scripts and their Python tests. Replaced their authority with Form-native proof bands: model-executor-proof-ledger 4095 four-way, native-training-receipt 16383 four-way, android-mesh-learning 131071 four-way, witness-state-receipt 67108863 four-way. Focused validate output included `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`; the combined manifest gate returned PASS-4WAY for native-training-receipt, model-executor-proof-ledger, android-mesh-learning, and witness-state-receipt. The remaining API Python is the dashboard compatibility reader over committed receipt JSON, not the proof/generation carrier. CI provenance failure exposed a bridge-only route signature drift, so api/app/main.py now preserves the observed /api or /v1 namespace when FastAPI reports mount-local route templates.

ci_validation.notes: Initial PR run failed API provenance assertions because middleware recorded /ping and /ideas/{idea_id} instead of the observed /api namespace; focused local provenance tests now pass after the scoped bridge normalization fix.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this carrier-release slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Receipt and proof-ledger authority is now Form-native; dashboard still reads committed native receipt artifacts.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Form/runtime proof and dashboard service tests
test_flows: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh native-training-receipt model-executor-proof-ledger android-mesh-learning witness-state-receipt

phase_gate.gate: Standalone Python receipt/ledger carriers must no longer be the proof authority for witness, Android, native training, or executor ledger lanes.
phase_gate.next: Move remaining host IO gaps into Form resource/process carriers: adb/device sampling, HTTP /state sampling, and JSON compatibility export.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Receipt lanes depended on standalone Python scripts for JSON materialization, live witness polling, adb capability receipts, and proof-ledger export/checks.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: Receipt lanes are proven by Form-native recipes and fourth-arm bands; standalone Python receipt scripts are deleted.
retuned_north_star: Python is compatibility bridge only where the web/API still requires it
Form resource/process carriers are the next release point for adb, HTTP /state, and JSON export
